column1: EXEC SQL ALTER SESSION SET NLS_DATE_FORMAT = 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'

column5: select sh.shipment_gid from SHIPMENT sh, SHIPMENT_TYPE stp where (sh.shipment_gid in (select sstop.shipment_gid from ORDER_RELEASE o, S_SHIP_UNIT_LINE ssul, S_SHIP_UNIT ssu, SHIPMENT_STOP_D sstopd, SHIPMENT_STOP sstop where (o.order_release_xid like 'OR-LINE%') and (ssul.order_release_gid=o.order_release_gid) and (ssu.s_ship_unit_gid=ssul.s_ship_unit_gid) and (sstopd.s_ship_unit_gid=ssu.s_ship_unit_gid) and (sstop.shipment_gid=sstopd.shipment_gid) and (sstop.stop_num=sstopd.stop_num))) and (sh.perspective='B') and (sh.shipment_type_gid=stp.shipment_type_gid) and (stp.shipment_type_xid!='NON FREIGHT RELATED CHARGE')
column6: select sh.shipment_gid from SHIPMENT sh, SHIPMENT_TYPE stp where (sh.shipment_gid in (select sstop.shipment_gid from ORDER_RELEASE o, S_SHIP_UNIT_LINE ssul, S_SHIP_UNIT ssu, SHIPMENT_STOP_D sstopd, SHIPMENT_STOP sstop where (o.order_release_xid like 'OR-LINE%') and (ssul.order_release_gid=o.order_release_gid) and (ssu.s_ship_unit_gid=ssul.s_ship_unit_gid) and (sstopd.s_ship_unit_gid=ssu.s_ship_unit_gid) and (sstop.shipment_gid=sstopd.shipment_gid) and (sstop.stop_num=sstopd.stop_num))) and (sh.shipment_gid=?) and (sh.perspective='B') and (sh.shipment_type_gid=stp.shipment_type_gid) and (stp.shipment_type_xid!='NON FREIGHT RELATED CHARGE')
